visual_analysis: The layout is well-organized, with clear distinctions between elements, contributing to a polished overall appearance. The use of a gradient background and contrasting colors enhances visual appeal, although there is some potential for overcrowding due to the amount of text.
educational_analysis: The educational concept of the Domain Name System is presented with sufficient clarity, although some instructional elements are lacking. While the visual representation is appropriate, the depth of information may not fully engage all learners in understanding the subject.
